strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent ecosystems, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth with Kotlin; Java exposure appears dated (robotics/National Instruments era)
Cloud breadth shown mainly via AWS CDK at Optilyz; GCP/Azure and Kubernetes depth not strongly evidenced beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: The candidate brings extensive fullstack experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and recent, directly relevant work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which aligns well with the role's internal automation tooling focus. Engineering craftsmanship, testing rigor, and architectural breadth are well-evidenced across many years and domains. Gaps include the absence of explicit Nest.js experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, though the candidate's polyglot history suggests these are learnable.
